{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Lindon's Sylvan Riverseed
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] has a [[Sylvan Riverseed]] that sleeps in his lap.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
